notes: Imported from IndicVoices Hindi valid split; repurposed as a Hindi pilot audio set for multilingual voice extension. This source was locally dual-annotated and adjudicated for PHQ-9/GAD-7, but it is not a native mental-health screening corpus.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: हिका सर्मा [noise] पंकज [umm] नाडियाल दिलीप कछावा विनोद गोसाइवाल और कपिल कुलदीप
